amended_provisions: Exhibit H to the Declaration is amended to reassign Casey W. Coe3 from Unit 4 to Unit 7, and Reese G. Loe12 from Unit 7 to Unit 4, as limited common elements appurtenant to those Units.
affected_unit_owners: the Owners of Unit 4 and Unit 7

consent_basis.author: Reviewing Attorney
consent_basis.basis: limited-common-element reallocation executed by the affected unit owners under 33 M.R.S. § 1602-108 — an expressly-permitted path; LCE reallocation is not a § 1602-107 allocated-interest change

touches_1602_117d.author: Reviewing Attorney
touches_1602_117d.basis: 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117(d) review of the amended provisions
